CFG.FILTER_LABELS: Only include issues with these labels (comma separated)
CFG.EXCLUDE_LABELS: Exclude issues with these labels (comma separated)

FORM_HELP: Configure Super Productivity to list open Gitea issues for a specific repository in the task creation panel. They will be listed as suggestions with a link to the issue and more information about it. You can also automatically import all open issues to your backlog.
